hooks.command: bash -c 'p="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$p" in *docker-compose.yml|*docker-compose.prod.yml) (cd "$(dirname "$p")" && docker compose -f "$(basename "$p")" config -q 2>&1 || true) ;; *prometheus/prometheus.yml|*prometheus/rules/*.yml) docker run --rm --entrypoint promtool -v "$(dirname "$(dirname "$p")")/prometheus":/etc/prometheus prom/prometheus:v2.54.1 check config /etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml 2>&1 ;; *alertmanager/alertmanager.yml) docker run --rm --entrypoint amtool -v "$(dirname "$p")":/etc/alertmanager prom/alertmanager:v0.27.0 check-config /etc/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml 2>&1 ;; *deploy/serverstate.conf) docker run --rm -v "$(dirname "$p")":/conf nginx:1.27-alpine sh -c "cp /conf/serverstate.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/serverstate.conf && nginx -t" 2>&1 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac'
